amendments.text:
Cockpit control knobs must conform to the general shapes (but not necessarily the exact sizes or specific proportions) in the following figure: Flap Control Knob
Landing Gear Control Knob 64-17; Issued on 03/25/64. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 64-17; Issued on 03/25/64. 4080; Issued on 09/28/64. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 4080; Issued on 09/28/64.
